executives.name: Christopher Galvin
executives.background: Mr. Galvin has served as a Director since 2009. He is the former Chairman and CEO of Motorola, Inc. and is currently Chairman and Co-Founder of Harrison Street Real Estate Capital.

executives.name: Egon Durban
executives.background: Co-CEO of Silver Lake, a global technology investment firm.

executives.name: Harry Wolin
executives.background: Mr. Wolin is AMD’s Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary. He has been with AMD since 2000 and was appointed General Counsel in 2003.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President and Director of Legal Affairs, Semiconductor Products Sector
